name: @celeborn/board-ui
description: Shared Celeborn board UI — source-only (no build step). Each app compiles the raw TSX via Next `transpilePackages`, so an edit here is picked up by both board/ and web/ with no publish or version bump. CELE-t98.
comment-types: react/react-dom are peerDependencies (the host app supplies the runtime), but the shared TSX is type-checked in-place by each app's `next build` (transpilePackages). TS resolves the 'react' type decls from board-ui's own location, so @types/* must be declared HERE, not relied upon as hoisted from a parent. Local installs hoist them to the root node_modules so it works without this; Vercel's root build hoisted them only into web/node_modules, breaking resolution from packages/board-ui/src (CELE-t113). Pinned to the root's exact versions so npm dedupes to one copy.
